title: McAfee Total Protection
short_desc: Award-winning antivirus + identity protection for unlimited devices in your household.
long_desc: McAfee Total Protection shields your family with award-winning antivirus, web protection, identity monitoring, and a password manager — all from a single subscription covering unlimited devices.
description1: McAfee Antivirus provides strong all-in-one protection with features like safe browsing (WebAdvisor) and a Vulnerability Scanner that detects risks before they become threats. It helps block malicious sites, phishing attacks, and keeps your system updated against the latest vulnerabilities.
description2: It also focuses on privacy and performance with tools like File Lock, Shredder, and QuickClean, while Safe Family and Identity Theft Protection add extra layers for family safety and personal data security—making it a complete, easy-to-use security solution.
how_to_use: Go to mcafee.com/activate and enter your product key
Register or log in to your account
Agree to the license and note your serial number

title: Malwarebytes Premium
short_desc: Advanced malware & ransomware removal with real-time protection for 3 devices.
long_desc: Malwarebytes Premium crushes malware, spyware, and ransomware that traditional antivirus misses. Features real-time protection, exploit shielding, and web protection for 3 devices.
description1: Malwarebytes Anti-Malware Premium delivers advanced, real-time protection against malware, spyware, rootkits, and ransomware. Its proactive technology blocks both known and unknown threats, prevents files from being locked, and stops exploits that target software vulnerabilities—keeping your system secure at all times.
description2: It also enhances safe browsing by blocking malicious websites, infected links, and harmful ads. With its fast, intelligent scanning mode, Malwarebytes detects active threats without slowing down your system, ensuring strong protection with minimal impact on performance.

title: Bitdefender Total Security
short_desc: Military-grade cybersecurity for up to 5 devices with multi-layer ransomware protection.
long_desc: Bitdefender Total Security delivers advanced threat defense, multi-layer ransomware protection, network threat prevention, and a VPN for 5 devices — with near-zero performance impact.
description1: Bitdefender Total Security 1 User 1 Year offers complete, all-in-one protection for Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS devices. It guards against viruses, malware, ransomware, phishing, and other online threats with advanced real-time security, while keeping your system fast and responsive.
description2: It also includes essential features like privacy tools, parental controls, and anti-theft protection, all managed from a simple, user-friendly dashboard—giving you reliable security and peace of mind across all your devices.

title: CCleaner Professional
short_desc: Clean, speed up, and protect your PC automatically with the world's #1 PC optimizer.
long_desc: CCleaner Professional automatically cleans junk files, fixes registry errors, and updates outdated software so your PC runs faster. Includes real-time monitoring and scheduled cleaning.
description1: Optimize your PC with CCleaner Professional. Speed up your system, fix issues, and enhance performance with automated cleaning and registry fixes.
description2: CCleaner Professional is your go-to tool for keeping your PC running smoothly and efficiently. Designed for users who want a faster, more responsive system, CCleaner Professional helps clean up unnecessary files, fix system errors, and free up space on your computer. With automatic cleaning, scheduled tasks, and registry cleaning, CCleaner makes it easier than ever to maintain your PC’s performance. Whether you’re dealing with system crashes, slow performance, or apps that won’t open, CCleaner quickly resolves these issues by cleaning out junk files, fixing broken registries, and optimizing system settings. It even helps with stuck updates, ensuring your PC is up-to-date and functioning well. The 1-Year Pro License provides full access to all features, including priority support.

title: iolo System Mechanic
short_desc: Repair, clean, and accelerate unlimited PCs in your home with iolo's award-winning toolkit.
long_desc: iolo System Mechanic repairs Windows problems, removes junk, and boosts speed across all your home PCs. Includes PC security, privacy cleaner, and startup optimizer.
description1: Maximize PC performance with iolo System Mechanic. Speed up startup, clean privacy traces, and optimize your system for smoother and faster operation.
description2: iolo System Mechanic is the all-in-one solution to improve the performance, speed, and security of your PC. With unlimited home PC support, this software is designed to keep your computers running at peak performance by fixing errors, removing junk files, and optimizing startup times. It features an advanced Startup Optimizer to prevent unnecessary programs from slowing down your boot time, and a Privacy Cleaner to remove sensitive data that could compromise your privacy. Whether you're dealing with sluggish performance, system freezes, or unwanted programs hogging resources, iolo System Mechanic helps ensure that your PC runs at its best. With support for Windows 7, 8, 10, and 11, it’s a must-have tool for anyone looking to keep their PC running fast and secure over time.

title: AVG TuneUp
short_desc: Automatically puts sleeping mode on unused apps to give your PC a speed boost.
long_desc: AVG TuneUp silently optimizes your PC in the background — freeing up RAM, cleaning disk space, and fixing software issues for up to 10 devices.
description1: Boost your PC’s performance with AVG TuneUp. Clean junk files, remove bloatware, and optimize startup for a faster, smoother system experience.
description2: AVG TuneUp is designed to keep your PC running at peak performance by removing clutter, fixing errors, and optimizing your system. With support for up to 10 devices, AVG TuneUp is perfect for home users with multiple PCs.

title: Windows 11 Home/Pro USB
short_desc: Official Windows 11 Home or Pro installation USB. Clean install or upgrade — ready to ship.
long_desc: Genuine Microsoft Windows 11 Home or Pro on a bootable USB drive. Use for clean installation, system upgrade, or full PC recovery. Includes product key card.

description2: Upgrade or reinstall your operating system with the Windows 11 Home/Pro USB from Microsoft. This bootable USB drive contains a genuine product key for either the Home or Pro edition of Windows 11 (choose at checkout), making it perfect for users who need a fresh installation or want to upgrade their current system to the latest version.

title: Windows Recovery USB Drive
short_desc: Pre-built Windows recovery USB — restore your PC to factory settings without a disc.
long_desc: Our pre-configured Windows Recovery USB lets you restore, repair, or reinstall Windows without needing the original disc. Works with Windows 10 and 11.
description1: Restore your Windows 10 or 11 system with ease using a bootable recovery USB. Includes a 32 GB drive and step-by-step recovery guide for quick repairs.
description2: The Windows Recovery USB Drive from MyComputerCare is the ultimate solution for restoring your system when it fails to start, crashes, or shuts down unexpectedly. This bootable USB (32 GB) allows you to perform crucial recovery operations on Windows 10 and 11 systems. Whether you need to reset, repair, or reinstall your operating system, this USB drive has you covered with built-in recovery modes for each scenario. Along with the USB, you’ll receive a step-by-step recovery guide, ensuring you can perform the recovery process quickly and without hassle. Plus, you’ll have 24/7 technician assistance and post-sale support, so you’re never alone during the recovery process.

title: Samsung 980 SSD (1TB)
short_desc: NVMe M.2 SSD delivering up to 3,500 MB/s read speeds — breathe new life into any PC.
long_desc: The Samsung 980 NVMe SSD delivers blazing sequential read speeds up to 3,500 MB/s. Perfect for upgrading a slow or failing drive, running a clean Windows install, or expanding storage.
description1: Upgrade your system speed with the Samsung 980 1TB NVMe SSD. Enjoy ultra-fast boot times, rapid file transfers, and improved overall performance.
description2: The Samsung 980 1TB NVMe SSD is designed to deliver a major performance upgrade for your PC or laptop. Built with PCIe 3.0 x4 and NVMe 1.4 technology, it offers significantly faster data access compared to traditional hard drives and SATA SSDs. With read speeds up to 3,500 MB/s and write speeds up to 3,000 MB/s, this SSD ensures quick boot times, faster application loading, and smooth multitasking.

title: WD Blue 2TB HDD
short_desc: Reliable 2TB 3.5-inch desktop hard drive for data storage and PC upgrades.
long_desc: The WD Blue 2TB desktop HDD is built for everyday computing with 7200 RPM performance and a 256 MB cache. A reliable choice for replacing a failing drive or expanding storage.
description1: Reliable 2TB storage solution with stable performance and high capacity for everyday computing, backups, and file storage needs.
description2: The WD Blue 2TB HDD is a dependable storage solution designed for everyday computing needs. With a large 2TB capacity, it provides ample space for documents, media files, games, and backups. Built with a 7200 RPM speed and a 256MB cache, this hard drive ensures smooth data access and consistent performance for general use and system upgrades.

title: Seagate Barracuda 2TB HDD
short_desc: Seagate's most popular desktop HDD — 2TB of fast, reliable storage.
long_desc: The Seagate Barracuda 2TB offers dependable storage at an affordable price. Ideal for desktop upgrades, backups, or replacing a failing hard drive.
description1: Expand your storage with the Seagate Barracuda 2TB HDD. High-speed 7200 RPM performance and reliable storage for all your data needs.
description2: The Seagate Barracuda 2TB HDD is the perfect choice for those looking for reliable and high-performance storage. With a spacious 2TB capacity, this hard drive is ideal for storing large files, games, videos, and much more. The 7200 RPM spin rate and 256MB cache ensure fast read and write speeds, enhancing your system’s overall performance and reducing delays during file transfers. This 3.5-inch HDD comes with a SATA 6 Gb/s interface for fast data transfers, and it’s built for reliability, backed by a 2-year warranty. Whether you're upgrading your existing storage or replacing a failing drive, the Seagate Barracuda offers exceptional performance at a great price.

title: Crucial MX500 1TB SSD
short_desc: SATA SSD with hardware encryption — drop-in upgrade for laptops and desktops.
long_desc: The Crucial MX500 is a 2.5-inch SATA SSD perfect for upgrading laptops and older desktops. Up to 560 MB/s reads with integrated AES 256-bit hardware encryption.
description1: Upgrade your computer's performance with the Crucial BX500 SSD, designed to deliver fast and reliable speed. With read speeds up to 540MB/s and write speeds up to 500MB/s, the BX500 offers an instant performance boost for all your computing tasks.
description2: Built with Micron’s thousands of hours of pre-release validation and rigorous qualification tests, the BX500 has been thoroughly vetted for reliability. This award-winning SSD is engineered to improve system responsiveness, making boot-up and file loading faster than ever.

long_desc: The Logitech K380 Bluetooth keyboard connects to up to 3 devices simultaneously. Compact, slim design with 2-year battery life. Works with Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.

description2: tay productive and comfortable with the Logitech K380 Wireless Keyboard, a compact and lightweight solution for typing on multiple devices. description2: Experience the future of home networking with the TP-Link Archer AX55 WiFi 6 Router. Designed to handle the demands of modern homes with multiple connected devices, this router offers ultra-fast speeds of up to 3000 Mbps (AX3000), including 2402 Mbps on 5 GHz and 574 Mbps on 2.4 GHz bands.

description2: Extend your WiFi network to every corner of your home with the TP-Link RE550 WiFi Range Extender. Designed to improve your network coverage, the RE550 offers dual-band speeds up to 1900 Mbps, ensuring that you can stream, game, and work without interruption in any room.

description2: The HP ENVY All-in-One Printer combines versatility with ease of use, making it the ideal choice for home offices and personal use. This multi-function printer can print, scan, and copy, allowing you to handle all your everyday printing tasks with one device. With Wi-Fi, USB, and Bluetooth connectivity, it provides flexible printing options whether you're connecting from your laptop, smartphone, or tablet.
